Tools/Netcat

Network Utilities

Netcat

Small networking utility for opening TCP/UDP connections, banner checks, and lab troubleshooting.

networkncbannersockettcpudp

Best For

Good for learning how raw network connections behave and for simple service checks in safe environments.

Responsible Use

Use this tool only in owned environments, classroom labs, CTFs, or engagements where you have explicit written permission. Keep notes focused on findings, risk, and remediation.

Official Resource

https://nc110.sourceforge.io/

Search Hints

network, nc, banner, socket, tcp, udp, troubleshooting

No ads. Markdown-powered. Built for quick reference.
